title: Edit Operation
description: A single edit operation applied to an artifact. Target addressing uses a discriminated union with type and value fields.

target.description: Target addressing — discriminated union on type field

type.description: Addressing mode: id (gap:target marker) or pointer (JSON Pointer RFC 6901)

value.description: Target identifier or JSON Pointer path

content.description: New content (required for replace, insert_before, insert_after)
